vocab.word: have one's head in the clouds
vocab.meaning: mơ mộng viển vông, không thực tế
vocab.example: I always had my head in the clouds as a child, spent hours daydreaming about becoming a space explorer while sitting in my backyard.

vocab.meaning: thích làm những việc khó khăn/khổ cực (ví von việc chơi thể thao cường độ cao)
vocab.example: I was a glutton for punishment when it came to football; I’d play until sunset even with scraped knees and exhaustion.

vocab.meaning: đi chơi và quậy phá tưng bừng (thường là với bạn bè)
vocab.example: During the summer festivals, my siblings and I would paint the town red, running through every stall and attraction in the local fair.

vocab.meaning: một người hoặc hoạt động cực kỳ vui nhộn
vocab.example: Playing charades with my cousins was always a barrel of laughs because everyone had such vivid and hilarious imaginations.

vocab.meaning: được mọi người đón nhận nồng nhiệt/thành công rực rỡ
vocab.example: My attempt at building a giant pillow fort always went down a storm with my friends; it was the ultimate hideout.

vocab.meaning: được làm điều mình giỏi nhất và yêu thích nhất
vocab.example: Give me a set of watercolors and a blank canvas, and I was truly in my element for the entire afternoon.

vocab.word: burn the candle at both ends
vocab.meaning: làm việc/chơi bời từ sáng sớm đến đêm khuya
vocab.example: We used to burn the candle at both ends during the holidays, waking up at dawn to cycle and staying up late to tell ghost stories.

vocab.meaning: đối mặt với khó khăn một cách bình thản
vocab.example: I loved learning complex card tricks, and even when I failed, I took the mistakes in my stride and just kept practicing.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động hết công suất/tràn đầy năng lượng
vocab.example: During our school sports days, I felt like I was firing on all cylinders, winning almost every race I entered.

vocab.meaning: khoảng thời gian tuyệt vời nhất trong đời
vocab.example: I had the time of my life exploring the local creek and catching tadpoles with my neighbors every weekend.
